data.title: Fighting Flares Up in Iran War as U.A.E. and Ships Are Attacked
data.description: The Emirates accused Iran of its first attack during the cease-fire as the U.S. deployed warships and jets to protect vessels in the Strait of Hormuz.
data.author: Lara Seligman, Costas Paris, Shelby Holliday, Rebecca Feng and Jared Malsin
